abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from declaring the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

actions.name: Papercuts
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may remove one Scheme marker between this model and the target.

triggers.name: SHHHHH!
triggers.text: Remove a Scheme marker within 1" of the target. When resolving, deal +2 damage to the target.

actions.name: Critical Lens
actions.effects: Choose a marker within 3" of the target. Make a marker of the chosen type within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Close Reading
triggers.text: Make a second marker of the chosen type within 3" of the first.

actions.name: Perfect Organization
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This model declares the Interact action, ignoring Summon tokens.
